etiquette.title: Greetings
etiquette.text: A handshake is standard; close friends do two cheek kisses.

etiquette.title: Dining pace
etiquette.text: Meals run long and unhurried - don't expect the bill until you ask for it.

etiquette.title: Tipping
etiquette.text: Not obligatory; rounding up or 5-10% for good service is generous.

neighborhoods.name: Graça & Mouraria
neighborhoods.description: Where Lisboetas actually live. Cheaper food, real neighborhood feel, some of the best viewpoints.

neighborhoods.name: Baixa & Chiado
neighborhoods.description: The postcard center - grand squares, shopping, easy walking, busiest with visitors.

neighborhoods.name: Alfama
neighborhoods.description: The oldest district, steep and narrow, fado music spilling out of small bars at night.

phrases.en: Thank you (said by a man / woman)

scams.title: Fake taxi meters
scams.description: Some drivers claim a broken meter and quote a flat inflated fare - insist on the meter or a pre-agreed ride-app price.

scams.title: Bracelet/rose 'gift'
scams.description: A stranger ties on a bracelet or hands you a rose, then demands payment - decline any unsolicited item outright.
